text.title: Requirements Traceability Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: RTM links requirement → code but not back to source elicitation.
antipattern.fix: Require source_ref (backward) AND design/code/test refs (forward); reject one-way matrices.

antipattern.symptom: RTM cites code paths that no longer exist after refactor.
antipattern.root-cause: RTM is never regenerated after code moves.
antipattern.fix: Run rtm_min.py on each PR; auto-flag stale links.

antipattern.symptom: coverage_pct reports 100% but is computed only over linked rows, ignoring orphans.
antipattern.root-cause: Author counts what is mapped rather than what is required.
antipattern.fix: Define coverage = linked / total_requirements; orphans count against denominator.
